title: AI Technical Leader & Community Manager
summary: Designing and implementing AI/ML solutions for Cisco's 400K+ SMB customers. Patent-pending inventor, LLM Center of Excellence contributor, and technical mentor.

sections.heading: AI Solutions & ML Infrastructure
items: Designed and developed patent-pending AI content creation pipeline, optimizing content production workflows
Architected and built internal AI tools leveraging Ollama and Open-WebUI, currently approaching beta testing phase
Developed Python-based Support Chatbot using Cisco BUFF platform and transformer models to improve content discovery
Active contributor to Cisco's LLM Center of Excellence since 2022, researching and implementing cutting-edge AI solutions

sections.heading: AI Technical Leadership & Mentorship
items: Lead a team of 4 engineers in AI skill development, focusing on LangChain implementation and prompt engineering
Created comprehensive AI educational materials and conducted company-wide training sessions
Presented multiple times at Cisco events on AI applications and best practices
Featured speaker at Cisco UI/UX Conference (dzone) on AI integration in user interfaces

sections.heading: End-to-End Solution Design
items: Led cross-functional collaboration with Cisco Webex Design team to integrate AI capabilities into product experiences
Developed AI Brainstorming session kit in partnership with design team to improve ideation processes
Designed and developed digital Hardware Installation Guide using SvelteKit, NodeJS, and Postgres
Built automation application reducing document publishing time from 3+ hours to <30 minutes using NodeJS

title: Team Lead, Content Development
summary: Led content development team at Cisco, driving AI adoption and workflow modernization that dramatically improved output and reach.

sections.heading: Technical Leadership & Solution Development
items: Led team in continuous improvement of workflow and toolchain, including JavaScript-based document feature development
Managed transition to AI-assisted content development, achieving 175% reduction in article production time
Mentored team in advanced web publishing techniques, resulting in 40% year-over-year growth in document visitors
Authored configuration guides and white papers for Cisco small business hardware

title: Principal & Technology Author
summary: Independent consulting and published author, bridging the gap between complex technology and accessible education.

sections.heading: AI & Technology Research
items: Researched and authored content on emerging AI technologies since 2017
Developed and published "Welcome to Tomorrow: A Beginner's Guide to Technology," a non-fiction educational work explaining complex technical concepts in accessible language
Created research-backed content introducing FinTech innovations for Visa's internal sales professionals

title: Product Innovation Lead
summary: Led product innovation in NYC's ad tech scene, developing first-in-industry interactive ad experiences for major brands on an HTML5 SaaS platform.

sections.heading: Product Development & Technical Leadership
items: Led skunk works team in developing first-in-industry ad units for brand awareness campaigns from concept through engineering specifications
Authored UI/UX design documentation and managed implementation of web application-style advertising products
Established thought leadership through published articles in industry periodical AdExchanger.com
